displayDescription.zh: 潜在狄利克雷分配为主题模型提供了清晰的概率形式。文档是主题的混合，主题是词的分布，推断过程估计生成可见文本的隐藏结构。LDA 成为探索性文本分析和概率机器学习教学中的标准模型。
displayDescription.en: Latent Dirichlet Allocation gave topic modeling a clean probabilistic form. Documents are mixtures of topics, topics are distributions over words, and inference estimates the hidden structure that produced observed text. LDA became a standard model for exploratory text analysis and probabilistic machine learning education.

description.en: Primary JMLR source for LDA; local images redraw topic mixtures and plate notation.
description.zh: LDA 的 《机器学习研究杂志》 原始来源；本地图重画主题混合和 plate notation。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

action.zh: 打开 《机器学习研究杂志》 论文

html.zh: 文本集合需要无需手工标注每个主题就能发现结构的方法。LDA 把隐藏主题假设明确写成概率模型。
html.en: Text collections needed methods that discovered structure without hand-labeling every theme. LDA made the hidden-topic assumption explicit and probabilistic.

html.zh: 每篇文档抽取一个主题混合；每个词先选择主题，再从该主题词分布中生成词。 关键机制是带 Dirichlet 先验的贝叶斯主题模型，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。
html.en: Each document draws a topic mixture; each word chooses a topic and then a word from that topic’s distribution. The key mechanism is Bayesian topic model with Dirichlet priors, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 LDA 视为经典概率主题模型，也是讲解生成式建模的教学范例。它的长期影响在于通过潜在结构提供可解释性，即使神经嵌入和 Transformer 在许多应用中表现更好，这一点仍有价值。
html.en: Experts generally treat LDA as a classic probabilistic topic model and a teaching example for generative modeling. Its long-term legacy is interpretability through latent structure, which remains useful even when neural embeddings and transformers perform better in many applications.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
